nasb.text: Now when Jesus came into the district of Caesarea Philippi, He was asking His disciples, “Who do people say that the Son of Man is?”

esv.text: Now when Jesus came into the district of Caesarea Philippi, he asked his disciples, “Who do people say that the Son of Man is?”

cnv.text: 耶穌來到該撒利亞．腓立比的地區，就問自己的門徒：“人說人子是誰？”

ccb.text: 到了凯撒利亚·腓立比境内，耶稣问门徒：“人们说人子是谁？”

csbs.text: 耶稣来到凯撒里亚菲利彼地区，就问他的门徒们，说：“人们说人子是谁？”
